name: glidescript-playground
description: A local GlideScript playground — write and run ServiceNow server-side scripts without an instance.

scripts.db:apply:local: npx wrangler d1 execute glidescript-playground --file db/schema.sql --local -y
scripts.dev:full: npm run db:apply:local && npm run build && npx wrangler pages dev dist --port 5180
scripts.deploy:cloudflare: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name glidescript-playground --commit-dirty=true
scripts.db:apply: npx wrangler d1 execute glidescript-playground --file db/schema.sql --remote -y
